checks.name: schema_completeness
checks.detail: All required payload fields present including customSections for intent catalog and Notion schema

checks.name: flow_integrity
checks.detail: 5 flows with webhook-triggered processing, proper start/end nodes, connected edges

checks.name: trigger_validity
checks.detail: Webhook trigger with path /segment-events and POST method — valid for real-time event ingestion

checks.name: connector_role_alignment
checks.detail: segment (analytics), slack (chat_messaging), notion (knowledge_base) — Segment maps to twilio-segment builtin

checks.name: adoption_question_fitness
checks.detail: 4 adoption_questions added covering segment_space_id, slack_sales_channel, notion_signals_db, high_intent_score_threshold

checks.name: default_value_coverage
checks.detail: Slack channel has sensible default (#sales-signals). Segment and Notion IDs require user input.

checks.name: prompt_quality
checks.detail: Identity 78w, instructions 500w+ with 6 steps, tool guidance with API endpoints, 2 detailed examples, comprehensive error handling

checks.name: safety_scan
checks.detail: 0 critical findings. Agent only reads events and writes to Slack/Notion — no destructive operations.

dimensions.name: Prompt Completeness
dimensions.rationale: Identity 78w, instructions cover 6 detailed steps with intent scoring catalog, tool guidance with specific API endpoints and auth patterns, 2 scenario examples (high intent and pattern escalation), error handling covers 6 failure categories.

dimensions.name: Tool-Prompt Alignment
dimensions.rationale: http_request for Segment Profiles, Slack, Notion APIs. file_read/file_write for cache and error queues. All tools referenced in prompt match suggested_tools.

dimensions.name: Trigger Coherence
dimensions.rationale: Single webhook trigger with path and method config. Real-time event processing aligns with the 'as-it-happens' intent classification workflow.

dimensions.name: Connector Coverage
dimensions.rationale: Segment connector defined with Profiles API access token. Slack and Notion connectors well-defined. Segment maps to twilio-segment builtin for adoption.

dimensions.name: Memory Design
dimensions.rationale: Excellent memory design: per-user behavioral history in agent_memory, local cache for userId-to-Notion-page mapping, 30-day behavioral tracking window, pattern escalation from accumulated medium signals.

dimensions.name: Error Handling
dimensions.rationale: Malformed webhooks, Profiles API failures (continues with degraded data), Slack retry + queue, Notion queue for next invocation, rate limits, unknown events default to STANDARD. Comprehensive.

dimensions.name: Use Case Fidelity
dimensions.rationale: Prompt covers all workflows in use_case_flows: event ingestion, intent classification, profile enrichment, sales alerting, signal logging, and pattern escalation.

dimensions.name: Value Clarity
dimensions.rationale: Crystal clear business outcome: transform raw product events into revenue-driving sales intelligence with sub-second alert delivery for high-intent signals.

dimensions.name: Execution Feasibility
dimensions.rationale: Requires Segment workspace with webhook destination configured, Segment Profiles API access, Slack bot, and Notion database. Standard APIs but multi-service setup adds complexity.

dimensions.name: Differentiation
dimensions.rationale: Pattern escalation engine (3 medium = high), behavioral memory accumulation, and contextual alert composition go well beyond what simple webhook-to-Slack routing provides.

dimensions.name: Variable Necessity
dimensions.rationale: All 4 adoption questions are genuinely needed. Segment Space ID and Notion DB ID are required; Slack channel and intent threshold are useful customizations.

dimensions.name: Default Quality
dimensions.rationale: Slack channel (#sales-signals) and intent threshold (80) have good defaults. Segment Space ID and Notion DB ID have no defaults — must be provided by user.

issues: No adoption_questions existed — connectors need user-specific configuration for Segment Space ID, Slack channel, and Notion database ID
Segment connector name 'segment' does not match builtin 'twilio-segment' — may need mapping in connectorRoles.ts

template: Added 4 adoption_questions: segment_space_id, slack_sales_channel, notion_signals_db, high_intent_score_threshold
